prototype: The citizen expresses dissatisfaction, anger, complaint, frustration, or distrust. 居民表达不满、生气、抱怨、失望或不信任的情绪。
keywords: dissatisfaction;anger;complaint;frustration;distrust;不满;抱怨;生气;失望;投诉;多次反映;不信任;没人处理;没有回应

prototype: The citizen asks government to clarify, adjust, implement, disclose, or process a policy. 居民希望政府明确、调整、处理、公开或说明某项政策。
keywords: clarify;adjust;implement;disclose;application process;policy plan;希望;要求;请求;明确;说明;申请;流程;调整;处理;公开;公布;补贴;方案

prototype: The citizen shows willingness to cooperate, participate, volunteer, provide feedback, or co-produce public service. 居民愿意配合、参与、协助或反馈，共同推动公共服务。
keywords: cooperate;participate;volunteer;assist;public outreach;feedback;愿意;配合;一起;参与;听证会;协助;志愿者;宣传;反馈;组织

prototype: The citizen expresses trust, satisfaction, gratitude, support, or confidence in government work. 居民对政府工作表示感谢、满意、支持或信任。
keywords: trust;satisfaction;gratitude;support;confidence;respectful explanation;感谢;满意;很好;支持;放心;信任;耐心;及时

prototype: The case indicates constructive engagement or a likely useful governance response. 案例显示建设性互动，政府回应处理得当、明确且配合居民需求。
keywords: implementation;clarification;cooperation;positive reception;disclosure;adjustment;feedback;处理;明确;说明;配合;感谢;满意;支持;公布;调整;反馈;登记
